title: Easy Auto Cycler
description: Automates Easy Villagers trade cycling with advanced filters! Set multiple criteria including custom payment items, minimum enchant levels, AND/OR logic. Session persistence saves your filters. Client-side with intuitive GUI.
body:
Tired of manually clicking the "Cycle Trades" button hundreds of times for that perfect enchantment? **Easy Auto Cycler** automates the grind!

This powerful, client-side mod provides advanced filtering and automatic villager trade cycling for Fabric, Forge, and NeoForge.

## **Key Features:**

*   **Client-Side Only:** Install it on your client and use it anywhere. No server-side installation required!
*   **Advanced Multi-Filter System:** Create complex search criteria using AND/OR logic to find exactly what you want.
*   **Custom Payment Items:** Not just emeralds! Filter by any payment item (books, diamonds, etc.).
*   **Minimum Level Matching:** Find enchantments at or above your desired level instead of exact matching.
*   **Session Persistence:** Your filters are automatically saved and restored between game sessions.
*   **Intuitive GUI:** Easy-to-use filter editor with auto-complete suggestions for enchantments and items.
*   **One-Key Toggle:** Start and stop automation with a configurable keybind (default 'R').
*   **Client-Side Only:** No need to install on the server!
*   **Mod Compatibility:** Works flawlessly with custom enchantments and items from other mods, as long as villagers can trade it.

## How to Use:

*   **Open the Config:** Press C (default) or click the "Cog" button inside the Villager trading screen.
*   **Create Your Filters:** 
    *   **Example 1** (Mending Books): Set Enchantment ID to minecraft:mending, Min Level: 1, Max Cost: 20. (Leaving the Payment item field empty defaults to Emeralds).

    *   **Example 2** (Specific Item): Set Enchantment ID to minecraft:sharpness, Min Level: 2, Target Item: minecraft:iron_sword.

*   **Let it Roll:** Press R (default) or click the "Play" button. The automation will rapidly cycle trades and stop automatically the moment your exact criteria are met!

## Requirements & Compatibility:

To use Easy Auto Cycler, you must install ONE of the following base cycling mods depending on your mod loader:

*   [Easy Villagers Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/easy-villagers)
    *    Supported on: Forge and NeoForge. (Note: This is not available on Fabric).

*   [Trade Cycling Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/trade-cycling)
    *    Supported on: Fabric, Forge, and NeoForge.

Note on Minecraft 1.21 (NeoForge): The 1.21.1 build is unlocked to run on 1.21, but it is provided "as-is" without active testing. We highly recommend updating your instance to 1.21.1 due to critical vanilla bugs present in base 1.21.

### **Need Help, Found a Bug or want to Request a Feature?**

*   Check the [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/Uncraftbar/Easy-Auto-Cycler)
*   Report Issues on the [GitHub Issues Page](https://github.com/Uncraftbar/Easy-Auto-Cycler/issues)

 

Feel free to include in any modpack <3
